name: cccdev
description: CLI tool for installing Cocos Creator devtools preview template
author: potato47

scripts.build: bun run --cwd packages/cccdev-template-3x build && bun run copy-template
scripts.copy-template: rm -rf template/3x && mkdir -p template/3x && cp -r packages/cccdev-template-3x/template/* template/3x/
